name: OT ADM Agent
description: Query and manage Opentext SDP work items — defects, stories, features, comments, and personal work lists — using natural language. Powered by a Gemini function-calling agent. Invoke with @OT ADM Agent in Google AgentSpace.

skills.name: Get Defect
skills.description: Retrieve a defect raw data from Opentext SDP by its unique identifier.

skills.name: Get Story
skills.description: Retrieve a story raw data from Opentext SDP by its unique identifier.

skills.name: Get Feature
skills.description: Retrieve raw data for a feature from Opentext SDP by its unique identifier.

skills.name: Get Comments
skills.description: Retrieve all comments and discussion threads for a specific entity (defect, story, or feature). Use this when asked to summarize discussions, review feedback, or understand the conversation around an entity.

skills.name: Create Comment
skills.description: Creates a comment for the specified work item. The text parameter accepts HTML, allowing rich formatting such as bold, color, and font changes.
examples: Add a comment to defect 2110 saying 'Reproduced on build 5.3'

skills.name: Update Comment
skills.description: Updates an existing comment on a work item. The text parameter accepts HTML for rich formatting.
examples: Update comment 99 on defect 2110 with new text

skills.name: Fetch My Work Items
skills.description: Fetches the current user's assigned work items (stories, defects, quality stories) including metadata like ID, name, phase, priority, story points, sprint, owner, severity, and more. Results are ordered by user priority/rank.
examples: Show my assigned defects and stories
